issues.title: Simplify VectorStore.delete(List<String> idList) to return void
issues.body:
Currently, the delete method returns Optional<Boolean>, which adds unnecessary complexity and is not meaningful for most implementations. The method should instead return void and rely on runtime exceptions to signal errors.

Changes needed:

- Update VectorStore interface to change delete() return type from Optional<Boolean> to void
- Modify all implementing classes to remove boolean return values
- Update related tests to remove Optional<Boolean> assertions
